results.question: 现在整体出租率怎么样？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
  CONCAT(ROUND(
    SUM(rented) / SUM(total) * 100, 2
  ), '%') AS occupancy_rate,
  SUM(rented) AS rented_rooms,
  SUM(total) AS total_rooms
FROM (
  -- 集中式房间出租率
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN fr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented,
    COUNT(*) AS total
  FROM qft_focus_room fr
  INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fr.housing_id = fh.id
  WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND fh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND fh.is_check_out = 0

  UNION ALL

  -- 合租房间出租率
  SELECT
    SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented,
    COUNT(*) AS total
  FROM qft_joint_room jr
  INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jr.housing_id = jh.id
  WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jr.transfer_status = 0
    AND jh.company_id = 1001
    AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete, 0) = 0
    AND jh.is_check_out = 0
) t;

SELECT
  store_id,
  SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
  SUM(rented_rooms) AS rented_rooms,
  ROUND(SUM(rented_rooms) * 100.0 / SUM(total_rooms), 2) AS occupancy_rate
FROM (
  SELECT

    COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
  FROM qft_focus_room r

    AND h.company_id = 1001
    AND h.is_delete = 0
    AND h.is_check_out = 0
  WHERE r.company_id = 1001
    AND r.is_delete = 0
  GROUP BY r.store_id

  UNION ALL

  SELECT
    r.store_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
    SUM(CASE WHEN r.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS rented_rooms
  FROM qft_joint_room r
  INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing h ON r.housing_id = h.id
    AND h.company_id = 1001
    AND h.is_delete = 0
    AND h.is_check_out = 0
    AND h.transfer_status = 0
  WHERE r.company_id = 1001
    AND r.is_delete = 0
    AND r.transfer_status = 0

SELECT
    s.store_id,
    s.store_name,
    -- 出租率：已出租房间数 / 总房间数
    s.total_rooms,
    s.rented_rooms,
    ROUND(IFNULL(s.rented_rooms / NULLIF(s.total_rooms, 0) * 100, 0), 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,
    -- 收入
    IFNULL(f_income.total_income, 0) AS total_income,
    -- 欠费
    IFNULL(b_arrears.total_arrears, 0) AS total_arrears,
    -- 综合排名分（出租率越低越差，收入越低越差，欠费越高越差）
    ROUND(
        IFNULL(s.rented_rooms / NULLIF(s.total_rooms, 0) * 100, 0) * 0.4
        + IFNULL(f_income.total_income, 0) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(t.ti) FROM (SELECT SUM(money) AS ti FROM qft_finance WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0 AND nature = 1 AND type IN (1,2,3) GROUP BY store_id) t), 1) * 100 * 0.3
        - IFNULL(b_arrears.total_arrears, 0) / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(t.ta) FROM (SELECT SUM(total_debt_money) AS ta FROM qft_bill WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0 AND is_invalid = 0 AND bill_status IN (0,2) AND trade_type = 1 GROUP BY store_id) t), 1) * 100 * 0.3
    , 2) AS composite_score
FROM (
    -- 每个门店的房间总数和已出租房间数
    SELECT
        fh.store_id,
        CONCAT('门店ID:', fh.store_id) AS store_name,
        COUNT(DISTINCT fh.id) AS total_housing,
        SUM(fh.room_count) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(fh.room_count - IFNULL(fh.rest_room_count, 0)) AS rented_rooms
    FROM qft_focus_housing fh
    WHERE fh.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fh.is_check_out = 0
    GROUP BY fh.store_id
) s
LEFT JOIN (
    -- 每个门店的收入总额
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(money) AS total_income
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND nature = 1
      AND transfer_status = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) f_income ON f_income.store_id = s.store_id
LEFT JOIN (
    -- 每个门店的欠费总额（应收未收）
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_debt_money) AS total_arrears
    FROM qft_bill
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND is_invalid = 0
      AND trade_type = 1
      AND bill_status IN (0, 2)
    GROUP BY store_id
) b_arrears ON b_arrears.store_id = s.store_id
ORDER BY composite_score ASC

    -- 出租率（已出租房间 / 总房间数）
    s.occupancy_rate,
    -- 月收入
    s.income_amount,
    -- 欠费率（欠费账单金额 / 应收总金额）
    s.arrears_rate,
    -- 维修响应（已完成维修占比）
    s.repair_response_rate,
    -- 健康度评分 = 出租率*40 + 收入排名得分*20 + (1-欠费率)*25 + 维修响应率*15
    ROUND(
        s.occupancy_rate * 40
        + s.income_score * 20
        + (1 - s.arrears_rate) * 25
        + s.repair_response_rate * 15
    , 2) AS health_score
FROM (
    SELECT
        t.store_id,
        t.store_name,
        t.occupancy_rate,
        t.income_amount,
        t.arrears_rate,
        t.repair_response_rate,
        -- 收入归一化：当前门店收入 / 最大门店收入
        IFNULL(t.income_amount / NULLIF((SELECT MAX(t2.income_amount) FROM (
            SELECT
                fh.store_id,
                IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN f.nature = 1 THEN f.money ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income_amount
            FROM qft_focus_housing fh
            LEFT JOIN qft_finance f ON f.housing_id = fh.id AND f.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(f.is_delete,0) = 0 AND f.type = 1 AND f.nature = 1
                AND f.account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
                AND f.account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
            WHERE fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0 AND fh.is_check_out = 0
            GROUP BY fh.store_id
        ) t2), 0), 0) AS income_score
    FROM (
        SELECT
            fh.store_id,
            MAX(a.area_name) AS store_name,
            -- 出租率：已出租房间数 / 总房间数
            IFNULL(
                SUM(CASE WHEN fh.rest_room_count = 0 AND fh.room_count > 0 THEN fh.room_count ELSE fh.room_count - IFNULL(fh.rest_room_count, 0) END)
                / NULLIF(SUM(fh.room_count), 0)
            , 0) AS occupancy_rate,
            -- 本月收入
            IFNULL(SUM(fin.month_income), 0) AS income_amount,
            -- 欠费率：欠费金额 / 应收总金额
            IFNULL(
                SUM(bill_agg.debt_money) / NULLIF(SUM(bill_agg.total_money), 0)
            , 0) AS arrears_rate,
            -- 维修响应率：已处理维修 / 总维修
            IFNULL(
                SUM(repair_agg.done_count) / NULLIF(SUM(repair_agg.total_count), 0)
            , 0) AS repair_response_rate
        FROM qft_focus_housing fh
        LEFT JOIN qft_area a ON a.id = fh.store_id AND a.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(a.is_delete,0) = 0
        -- 本月收入
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT f.housing_id, SUM(f.money) AS month_income
            FROM qft_finance f
            WHERE f.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(f.is_delete,0) = 0 AND f.nature = 1
                AND f.account_date >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
                AND f.account_date < DATE_ADD(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
            GROUP BY f.housing_id
        ) fin ON fin.housing_id = fh.id
        -- 欠费统计（集中应支）
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT be.housing_id,
                SUM(be.final_money) AS total_money,
                SUM(be.arrear_money) AS debt_money
            FROM qft_focus_bill_expend be
            WHERE be.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(be.is_delete,0) = 0 AND be.is_history = 0
            GROUP BY be.housing_id
        ) bill_agg ON bill_agg.housing_id = fh.id
        -- 维修响应（交割单作为维修近似：审核通过=已处理）
        LEFT JOIN (
            SELECT do2.housing_id,
                COUNT(*) AS total_count,
                SUM(CASE WHEN do2.state = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS done_count
            FROM qft_focus_delivery_order do2
            WHERE do2.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(do2.is_delete,0) = 0 AND do2.sale_type = 1
            GROUP BY do2.housing_id
        ) repair_agg ON repair_agg.housing_id = fh.id
        WHERE fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0 AND fh.is_check_out = 0
        GROUP BY fh.store_id
    ) t
) s
ORDER BY health_score DESC
LIMIT 3;

```sql
    -- 合租房源出租率
    joint_total.total_rooms AS joint_total_rooms,
    joint_leased.leased_rooms AS joint_leased_rooms,
    ROUND(joint_leased.leased_rooms * 100.0 / NULLIF(joint_total.total_rooms, 0), 2) AS joint_occupancy_rate,

    -- 整体出租率
    (focus_total.total_rooms + joint_total.total_rooms) AS overall_total_rooms,
    (focus_leased.leased_rooms + joint_leased.leased_rooms) AS overall_leased_rooms,
    ROUND(
        (focus_leased.leased_rooms + joint_leased.leased_rooms) * 100.0
        / NULLIF((focus_total.total_rooms + joint_total.total_rooms), 0),
        2
    ) AS overall_occupancy_rate

FROM
    -- 集中房源总房间数
    (
        SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rooms
        FROM qft_focus_room r
        INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing h ON r.housing_id = h.id
        WHERE r.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND IFNULL(h.is_delete, 0) = 0

        WHERE r.company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(r.is_delete, 0) = 0
```

```sql
results.question: 现在整体出租率怎么样？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2
  ) AS '整体出租率(%)',
  SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS '已租房间数',
  COUNT(*) AS '总房间数'
FROM (
  SELECT is_lease FROM qft_focus_room 
  WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT is_lease FROM qft_whole_room 
  WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT is_lease FROM qft_joint_room 
  WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete,0) = 0
) t;

results.question: 张三租的哪间房？月租多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
  '集中' AS business_type,
  ft.name AS tenant_name,
  ft.phone,
  fr.room_number,
  fh.house_code,
  fti.lease_price AS monthly_rent,
  fti.lease_starttime,
  fti.lease_endtime
FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
JOIN qft_focus_tenants_info fti ON fti.tenant_id = ft.id AND fti.company_id = 1001
JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.id = ft.room_id AND fr.company_id = 1001 AND fr.is_delete = 0
JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.id = fr.housing_id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE ft.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND ft.name = '张三'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  '整租' AS business_type,
  wt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
  wt.phone,
  wh.door_number AS room_number,
  wh.house_code,
  wt.lease_price AS monthly_rent,
  wt.lease_starttime,
  wt.lease_endtime
FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.id = wt.room_id AND wr.company_id = 1001 AND wr.is_delete = 0
JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.id = wr.housing_id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE wt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND wt.tenants_name = '张三'

UNION ALL

SELECT 
  '合租' AS business_type,
  jt.tenants_name AS tenant_name,
  jt.phone,
  jr.room_number,
  jh.house_code,
  jt.lease_price AS monthly_rent,
  jt.lease_starttime,
  jt.lease_endtime
FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND jr.is_delete = 0
JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete,0) = 0
WHERE jt.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND jt.tenants_name = '张三';

results.question: 有多少房间还没做交割？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS 未做交割房间数
FROM (
    -- 集中式已租房间
    SELECT fr.id AS room_id, 1 AS sale_type
    FROM qft_focus_room fr
    WHERE fr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fr.is_lease = 1
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- 整租已租房间
    SELECT wr.id AS room_id, 2 AS sale_type
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND wr.is_lease = 1
    
    UNION ALL
    
    -- 合租已租房间
    SELECT jr.id AS room_id, 3 AS sale_type
    FROM qft_joint_room jr
    WHERE jr.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND jr.is_lease = 1
) r
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM qft_focus_delivery_order fdo
    WHERE fdo.company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(fdo.is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND fdo.room_id = r.room_id
      AND fdo.sale_type = r.sale_type
      AND fdo.role = 1
);

results.question: 张三那小子交租了没？欠多少？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    jt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    jt.phone AS 联系电话,
    CASE i.business_type WHEN 2 THEN '整租' WHEN 3 THEN '合租' END AS 业务类型,
    i.collection_date AS 收款日期,
    i.start_valid_date AS 账期开始,
    i.end_valid_date AS 账期结束,
    i.final_money AS 应收金额,
    i.real_money AS 已收金额,
    i.debt_money AS 欠款金额,
    CASE i.pay_status WHEN 1 THEN '未收' WHEN 2 THEN '部分收' WHEN 3 THEN '已收完' WHEN 4 THEN '坏账' END AS 收款状态
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_joint_tenants jt ON jt.id = i.tenants_id AND jt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
    AND jt.tenants_name = '张三'
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND i.business_type = 3
  AND i.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND i.contract_type = 1

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    wt.tenants_name AS 租客姓名,
    wt.phone AS 联系电话,
    '整租' AS 业务类型,
    i.collection_date AS 收款日期,
    i.start_valid_date AS 账期开始,
    i.end_valid_date AS 账期结束,
    i.final_money AS 应收金额,
    i.real_money AS 已收金额,
    i.debt_money AS 欠款金额,
    CASE i.pay_status WHEN 1 THEN '未收' WHEN 2 THEN '部分收' WHEN 3 THEN '已收完' WHEN 4 THEN '坏账' END AS 收款状态
FROM qft_joint_tenants_income i
JOIN qft_whole_tenants wt ON wt.id = i.tenants_id AND wt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0
    AND wt.tenants_name = '张三'
WHERE i.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(i.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND i.business_type = 2
  AND i.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND i.contract_type = 1

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    ft.name AS 租客姓名,
    ft.phone AS 联系电话,
    '集中' AS 业务类型,
    fi.collection_date AS 收款日期,
    fi.start_valid_date AS 账期开始,
    fi.end_valid_date AS 账期结束,
    fi.final_money AS 应收金额,
    fi.real_money AS 已收金额,
    fi.debt_money AS 欠款金额,
    CASE fi.pay_status WHEN 1 THEN '未收' WHEN 2 THEN '部分收' WHEN 3 THEN '已收完' WHEN 4 THEN '坏账' END AS 收款状态
FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fi
JOIN qft_focus_tenants ft ON ft.id = fi.tenants_id AND ft.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0) = 0
    AND ft.name = '张三'
WHERE fi.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete,0) = 0
  AND fi.pay_status IN (1, 2)
  AND fi.contract_type = 1

ORDER BY 收款日期 ASC;

results.question: 帮我看看哪个门店综合表现最差，我考虑关掉它。从出租率、收入、欠费几个角度分析一下。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,

    -- 房间总数（集中 + 整租 + 合租）
    IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0) AS total_rooms,

    -- 已租房间数
    IFNULL(fr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_leased.cnt, 0) AS leased_rooms,

    -- 出租率
    ROUND(
        (IFNULL(fr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_leased.cnt, 0))
        / NULLIF(IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0), 0) * 100
    , 2) AS occupancy_rate,

    -- 近12个月收入总额（财务已出纳）
    IFNULL(fin_income.total_income, 0) AS total_income_12m,

    -- 近12个月支出总额
    IFNULL(fin_expend.total_expend, 0) AS total_expend_12m,

    -- 收支差（利润）
    IFNULL(fin_income.total_income, 0) - IFNULL(fin_expend.total_expend, 0) AS net_profit_12m,

    -- 当前应收欠费（集中）
    IFNULL(focus_debt.debt, 0) AS focus_debt,

    -- 当前应收欠费（整租+合租）
    IFNULL(joint_debt.debt, 0) AS joint_debt,

    -- 总欠费
    IFNULL(focus_debt.debt, 0) + IFNULL(joint_debt.debt, 0) AS total_debt,

    -- 综合评分（越低越差）：出租率权重40 + 月均利润权重30 + 欠费反向权重30
    ROUND(
        IFNULL(
            (IFNULL(fr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_leased.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_leased.cnt, 0))
            / NULLIF(IFNULL(fr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(wr_total.cnt, 0) + IFNULL(jr_total.cnt, 0), 0) * 100
        , 0) * 0.4
        + (IFNULL(fin_income.total_income, 0) - IFNULL(fin_expend.total_expend, 0)) / 12 * 0.001 * 0.3
        - (IFNULL(focus_debt.debt, 0) + IFNULL(joint_debt.debt, 0)) * 0.001 * 0.3
    , 2) AS composite_score

FROM qft_store s

-- 集中房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) fr_total ON fr_total.store_id = s.id

-- 集中已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_focus_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY store_id
) fr_leased ON fr_leased.store_id = s.id

-- 整租房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT wh.store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND wr.is_delete = 0
    GROUP BY wh.store_id
) wr_total ON wr_total.store_id = s.id

-- 整租已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT wh.store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_whole_room wr
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND wr.is_delete = 0 AND wr.is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY wh.store_id
) wr_leased ON wr_leased.store_id = s.id

-- 合租房间总数
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) jr_total ON jr_total.store_id = s.id

-- 合租已租房间
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt
    FROM qft_joint_room
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0 AND is_lease = 1
    GROUP BY store_id
) jr_leased ON jr_leased.store_id = s.id

-- 近12个月收入
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, SUM(money) AS total_income
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND nature = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
    GROUP BY store_id
) fin_income ON fin_income.store_id = s.id

-- 近12个月支出
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, SUM(money) AS total_expend
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0 AND nature = 0
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
    GROUP BY store_id
) fin_expend ON fin_expend.store_id = s.id

-- 集中应收欠费
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, SUM(debt_money) AS debt
    FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND pay_status IN (1, 2) AND contract_type = 1
    GROUP BY store_id
) focus_debt ON focus_debt.store_id = s.id

-- 整租+合租应收欠费
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id, SUM(debt_money) AS debt
    FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
    WHERE company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND pay_status IN (1, 2) AND contract_type = 1 AND transfer_status = 0
    GROUP BY store_id
) joint_debt ON joint_debt.store_id = s.id

WHERE s.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0

ORDER BY composite_score ASC
LIMIT 20;

results.question: 帮三个门店做个健康度评分吧，出租率、收入、欠费率、维修响应都考虑进去。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,

    room_stat.total_rooms,
    room_stat.leased_rooms,
    ROUND(IFNULL(room_stat.leased_rooms / NULLIF(room_stat.total_rooms, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS occupancy_rate_pct,

    IFNULL(fin_stat.total_income, 0) AS income_90d,

    IFNULL(debt_stat.total_final_money, 0) AS receivable_money,
    IFNULL(debt_stat.total_debt_money, 0) AS debt_money,
    ROUND(IFNULL(debt_stat.total_debt_money / NULLIF(debt_stat.total_final_money, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS debt_rate_pct,

    IFNULL(repair_stat.total_repairs, 0) AS total_repairs,
    IFNULL(repair_stat.completed_repairs, 0) AS completed_repairs,
    ROUND(IFNULL(repair_stat.completed_repairs / NULLIF(repair_stat.total_repairs, 0), 0) * 100, 2) AS repair_complete_rate_pct,
    ROUND(IFNULL(repair_stat.avg_response_hours, 0), 1) AS avg_repair_response_hours,

    ROUND(
        IFNULL(room_stat.leased_rooms / NULLIF(room_stat.total_rooms, 0), 0) * 35
      + CASE
            WHEN fin_max.max_income > 0
            THEN IFNULL(fin_stat.total_income, 0) / fin_max.max_income * 25
            ELSE 0
        END
      + (1 - IFNULL(debt_stat.total_debt_money / NULLIF(debt_stat.total_final_money, 0), 0)) * 25
      + IFNULL(repair_stat.completed_repairs / NULLIF(repair_stat.total_repairs, 0), 0) * 15
    , 1) AS health_score

FROM qft_store s

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        store_id,
        SUM(total_rooms) AS total_rooms,
        SUM(leased_rooms) AS leased_rooms
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
               SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
        FROM qft_focus_room
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0
        GROUP BY store_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT wh.store_id AS store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
               SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
        FROM qft_whole_room wr
        INNER JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.id = wr.housing_id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND wh.is_delete = 0
        WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND wr.is_delete = 0
        GROUP BY wh.store_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT store_id,
               COUNT(*) AS total_rooms,
               SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
        FROM qft_joint_room
        WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0
        GROUP BY store_id
    ) u
    GROUP BY store_id
) room_stat ON room_stat.store_id = s.id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(money) AS total_income
    FROM qft_finance
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND nature = 1
      AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
    GROUP BY store_id
) fin_stat ON fin_stat.store_id = s.id

CROSS JOIN (
    SELECT MAX(t.total_income) AS max_income
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id, SUM(money) AS total_income
        FROM qft_finance
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND nature = 1
          AND account_date >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
        GROUP BY store_id
    ) t
) fin_max

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           SUM(total_final) AS total_final_money,
           SUM(total_debt)  AS total_debt_money
    FROM (
        SELECT store_id,
               SUM(final_money) AS total_final,
               SUM(debt_money)  AS total_debt
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND transfer_status = 0
          AND contract_type IN (1, 2, 3)
        GROUP BY store_id
        UNION ALL
        SELECT store_id,
               SUM(final_money) AS total_final,
               SUM(debt_money)  AS total_debt
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income
        WHERE company_id = 1001
          AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
          AND contract_type IN (1, 2, 3)
        GROUP BY store_id
    ) d
    GROUP BY store_id
) debt_stat ON debt_stat.store_id = s.id

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT store_id,
           COUNT(*)                                                          AS total_repairs,
           SUM(CASE WHEN repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)              AS completed_repairs,
           AVG(CASE WHEN receive_time IS NOT NULL
                     THEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, create_time, receive_time)
                     ELSE NULL END)                                          AS avg_response_hours
    FROM qft_room_repair
    WHERE company_id = 1001
      AND IFNULL(is_delete, 0) = 0
      AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY)
    GROUP BY store_id
) repair_stat ON repair_stat.store_id = s.id

WHERE s.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(s.is_delete, 0) = 0

ORDER BY health_score DESC
LIMIT 3;

results.question: 每个小区的投资回报情况怎么样？装修花了多少，租金收回来多少了？
results.generated_sql:
SELECT
    ap.property_adrr AS 小区名称,
    IFNULL(ren.装修总成本, 0) AS 装修总成本,
    IFNULL(income.租金已收总额, 0) AS 租金已收总额,
    IFNULL(expend.房东已付总额, 0) AS 房东已付总额,
    IFNULL(income.租金已收总额, 0) - IFNULL(expend.房东已付总额, 0) AS 租金净收入,
    IFNULL(income.租金已收总额, 0) - IFNULL(expend.房东已付总额, 0) - IFNULL(ren.装修总成本, 0) AS 投资回报净额,
    CASE WHEN IFNULL(ren.装修总成本, 0) > 0
         THEN ROUND((IFNULL(income.租金已收总额, 0) - IFNULL(expend.房东已付总额, 0)) / ren.装修总成本 * 100, 2)
         ELSE NULL
    END AS 装修回报率百分比
FROM qft_area_property ap
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT rr.property_adrr_id, SUM(rr.renovation_cost) AS 装修总成本
    FROM qft_rm_renovation_record rr
    WHERE rr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(rr.is_delete, 0) = 0
    GROUP BY rr.property_adrr_id
) ren ON ren.property_adrr_id = ap.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT property_id, SUM(已收) AS 租金已收总额
    FROM (
        SELECT fh.property_adrr AS property_id, SUM(fi.real_money) AS 已收
        FROM qft_focus_tenants_income fi
        JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fi.housing_id = fh.id AND fh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE fi.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fi.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY fh.property_adrr
        UNION ALL
        SELECT wh.property_adrr, SUM(jti.real_money)
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
        JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON jti.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE jti.company_id = 1001 AND jti.business_type = 2 AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY wh.property_adrr
        UNION ALL
        SELECT jh.property_adrr, SUM(jti.real_money)
        FROM qft_joint_tenants_income jti
        JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jti.housing_id = jh.id AND jh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE jti.company_id = 1001 AND jti.business_type = 3 AND IFNULL(jti.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY jh.property_adrr
    ) t_inc
    GROUP BY property_id
) income ON income.property_id = ap.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT property_id, SUM(已付) AS 房东已付总额
    FROM (
        SELECT fh.property_adrr AS property_id, SUM(fe.real_money) AS 已付
        FROM qft_focus_bill_expend fe
        JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fe.housing_id = fh.id AND fh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE fe.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fe.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY fh.property_adrr
        UNION ALL
        SELECT wh.property_adrr, SUM(we.real_money)
        FROM qft_whole_bill_expend we
        JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON we.housing_id = wh.id AND wh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE we.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(we.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY wh.property_adrr
        UNION ALL
        SELECT jh.property_adrr, SUM(je.real_money)
        FROM qft_joint_bill_expend je
        JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON je.housing_id = jh.id AND jh.company_id = 1001
        WHERE je.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(je.is_delete, 0) = 0
        GROUP BY jh.property_adrr
    ) t_exp
    GROUP BY property_id
) expend ON expend.property_id = ap.id
WHERE ap.company_id = 1001
  AND IFNULL(ap.is_delete, 0) = 0
  AND (ren.装修总成本 IS NOT NULL OR income.租金已收总额 IS NOT NULL OR expend.房东已付总额 IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY 投资回报净额 DESC;

results.question: 有没有哪个门店在吃老本？就是新签租客少、但还靠老租客撑着的。
results.generated_sql:
SELECT 
    s.id AS store_id,
    s.name AS store_name,
    -- 当前在租租客总数
    (
        IFNULL(focus_total, 0) + IFNULL(whole_total, 0) + IFNULL(joint_total, 0)
    ) AS total_tenants,
    -- 最近90天新签租客数
    (
        IFNULL(focus_new, 0) + IFNULL(whole_new, 0) + IFNULL(joint_new, 0)
    ) AS new_tenants_90d,
    -- 新签占比
    ROUND(
        (IFNULL(focus_new, 0) + IFNULL(whole_new, 0) + IFNULL(joint_new, 0)) * 100.0 
        / NULLIF(IFNULL(focus_total, 0) + IFNULL(whole_total, 0) + IFNULL(joint_total, 0), 0)
    , 2) AS new_tenant_pct
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT fh.store_id,
           COUNT(ft.id) AS focus_total,
           SUM(CASE WHEN ft.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS focus_new
    FROM qft_focus_tenants ft
    JOIN qft_focus_room fr ON fr.id = ft.room_id AND fr.company_id = 1001 AND fr.is_delete = 0
    JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.id = fr.housing_id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0 AND fh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE ft.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(ft.is_delete,0) = 0
    GROUP BY fh.store_id
) t1 ON t1.store_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT wh.store_id,
           COUNT(wt.id) AS whole_total,
           SUM(CASE WHEN wt.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS whole_new
    FROM qft_whole_tenants wt
    JOIN qft_whole_room wr ON wr.id = wt.room_id AND wr.company_id = 1001 AND wr.is_delete = 0
    JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wh.id = wr.housing_id AND wh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wh.is_delete,0) = 0 AND wh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE wt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wt.is_delete,0) = 0
    GROUP BY wh.store_id
) t2 ON t2.store_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT jh.store_id,
           COUNT(jt.id) AS joint_total,
           SUM(CASE WHEN jt.create_time >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS joint_new
    FROM qft_joint_tenants jt
    JOIN qft_joint_room jr ON jr.id = jt.room_id AND jr.company_id = 1001 AND jr.is_delete = 0
    JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete,0) = 0 AND jh.is_check_out = 0
    WHERE jt.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jt.is_delete,0) = 0
    GROUP BY jh.store_id
) t3 ON t3.store_id = s.id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(s.is_delete,0) = 0
HAVING total_tenants > 0
ORDER BY new_tenant_pct ASC, total_tenants DESC;

results.question: 整体业务健康度怎么样？出租率、回款率、空置率综合评估一下。

WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0

  FROM qft_focus_room fr INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.id = fr.housing_id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0 AND fh.is_check_out = 0
  WHERE fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete,0) = 0

  WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
  UNION ALL

  WHERE jr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jr.is_delete,0) = 0
) t

-- 5. 综合空置率

  CONCAT(ROUND(SUM(vacant) * 100.0 / SUM(total), 2), '%') AS value,

FROM (

  FROM qft_focus_room fr INNER JOIN qft_focus_housing fh ON fh.id = fr.housing_id AND fh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fh.is_delete,0) = 0 AND fh.is_check_out = 0
  WHERE fr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(fr.is_delete,0) = 0
  UNION ALL

  WHERE wr.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(wr.is_delete,0) = 0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN jr.is_lease = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), COUNT(*)
  FROM qft_joint_room jr INNER JOIN qft_joint_housing jh ON jh.id = jr.housing_id AND jh.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(jh.is_delete,0) = 0 AND jh.is_check_out = 0

    WHEN contract_year >= 1 THEN '1-2年'
    WHEN contract_month >= 6 THEN '6个月-1年'
    ELSE '6个月以内'
  END
```

```sql
-- 11. 维修工单处理效率
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m') AS month_val,
  COUNT(*) AS total_repairs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS completed,
  SUM(CASE WHEN repair_status = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS pending,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN repair_status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*) * 100, 2) AS completion_rate,
  ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN repair_status = 2 THEN DATEDIFF(progress_time, create_time) END), 1) AS avg_resolve_days
FROM qft_room_repair
WHERE company_id = 1001 AND is_delete = 0
  AND create_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month_val
```

```sql
-- 13. 各店面出租率对比
SELECT s.id AS store_id, s.name AS store_name,
  IFNULL(jr_stat.total_rooms, 0) AS joint_total,
  IFNULL(jr_stat.leased_rooms, 0) AS joint_leased,
  IFNULL(wr_stat.total_rooms, 0) AS whole_total,
  IFNULL(wr_stat.leased_rooms, 0) AS whole_leased,
  IFNULL(fr_stat.total_rooms, 0) AS focus_total,
  IFNULL(fr_stat.leased_rooms, 0) AS focus_leased,
  ROUND(
    (IFNULL(jr_stat.leased_rooms,0) + IFNULL(wr_stat.leased_rooms,0) + IFNULL(fr_stat.leased_rooms,0)) /
    NULLIF(IFNULL(jr_stat.total_rooms,0) + IFNULL(wr_stat.total_rooms,0) + IFNULL(fr_stat.total_rooms,0), 0) * 100
  , 2) AS overall_lease_rate
FROM qft_store s
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS total_rooms, SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
  FROM qft_joint_room WHERE company_id=1001 AND is_delete=0 GROUP BY store_id
) jr_stat ON s.id = jr_stat.store_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT wh.store_id, COUNT(*) AS total_rooms, SUM(CASE WHEN wr.is_lease=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
  FROM qft_whole_room wr JOIN qft_whole_housing wh ON wr.housing_id=wh.id AND wh.is_delete=0
  WHERE wr.company_id=1001 AND wr.is_delete=0 GROUP BY wh.store_id
) wr_stat ON s.id = wr_stat.store_id
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT store_id, COUNT(*) AS total_rooms, SUM(CASE WHEN is_lease=1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS leased_rooms
  FROM qft_focus_room WHERE company_id=1001 AND is_delete=0 GROUP BY store_id
) fr_stat ON s.id = fr_stat.store_id
WHERE s.company_id = 1001 AND IFNULL(s.is_delete,0) = 0
ORDER BY overall_lease_rate ASC
```
